query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on remote sensing image segmentation using hypergraphs to handle missing modalities, which is an off-domain application (computer vision/remote sensing) that does not address the user's specific focus on "multimodal tabular learning" or the integration of text and image data for tabular benchmarks.
